$comment: Verified false positives for scripts/check-artifact-ui-contradictions.mjs (cinatra#1627, epic cinatra#1620 S10 AC5). Each entry suppresses ONE pattern id on ONE exact source LINE (the "snippet" is the full trimmed line). Use an entry ONLY for genuine non-artifact content the artifact-scoped pattern misfires on (e.g. an agent/skill kind legitimately having no runtime code); never to re-admit a superseded artifact-boundary claim. Every entry needs owner + reviewBy so it cannot become permanent silently: once reviewBy passes the entry stops suppressing until a human re-verifies and renews the date, or removes the entry. Starts EMPTY: the rewritten pack has no legitimate collisions.
